prestazioni: Engine swap to 2GR-FKS (3.5L V6, 310hp stock) with a HKS GT-SS turbo kit (Garrett GTX3582R turbo, 3.5bar MAP sensor, HKS intercooler, and HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve) paired with a K&N Typhoon cold air intake and Apexi Power FC standalone ECU for precise fuel and ignition mapping.

Full drivetrain reinforcement: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (4.625 final drive ratio) with a TRD 8-speed automatic transmission tune (shift kit by Level 10 Motorsports) and a Cusco 3-way adjustable rear differential mount to handle increased torque.

Suspension overhaul with Tein Flex Z coilovers (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear springs) paired with Whiteline front sway bar (24mm adjustable) and Cusco rear sway bar (22mm) for reduced body roll. Polyurethane bushings (SuperPro) replace all OEM rubber for sharper handling.
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works widebody kit (Noah-specific, 50mm wider front fenders, 60mm wider rear) with custom carbon fiber side skirts and a Varis Japan front lip spoiler for aggressive stance and aero balance.

Rocket Bunny rear diffuser (Noah-specific, 3-piece carbon fiber) paired with a custom 3D-printed roof spoiler (carbon fiber, 300mm chord) to reduce lift at high speeds. Front bumper replaced with a Seibon carbon fiber unit (OEM+ design with integrated canards).

Wheel setup: Work Emotion CR Kiwami (18x9.5 +30 front, 18x10.5 +35 rear) with Toyo R888R tires (245/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear). Custom center caps with engraved Toyota Gazoo Racing logo and gold hardware for JDM flair.
